settingsCore.title: Settings
settingsCore.description: Manage your account and app preferences for this device.

profile.title: Profile
profile.readOnlyNotice: Profile editing is not connected to a server endpoint in this version. These details come from your signed-in account.

account.title: Preferences
account.description: Device-level controls for the current app session.
account.themeDescription: Choose light, dark, or system appearance.

notificationsPage.title: Notifications
notificationsPage.description: Review finance reminder preferences for this session.
notificationsPage.preferencesDescription: These controls are usable locally and do not create server-side notification delivery.
notificationsPage.deliveryDescription: Server notification delivery is outside the v1 scope.
notificationsPage.localOnlyNotice: Changes on this page are local UI preferences for the current session. They are not saved to your account yet.

budgetAlerts.title: Budget alerts
budgetAlerts.description: Warn when a category is close to or over budget.

debtReminders.title: Debt reminders
debtReminders.description: Remind you to review upcoming debt payments.

savingsProgress.title: Savings progress
savingsProgress.description: Highlight saving goals that are moving or behind schedule.

monthlySummary.title: Monthly summary
monthlySummary.description: Show a monthly finance review prompt.

aiConfirmations.title: AI transaction confirmations
aiConfirmations.description: Keep confirmations visible before AI-created records are saved.

helpCenter.title: Help Center
helpCenter.description: Find quick guidance for the finance workflows available in the app.
helpCenter.faqDescription: Short answers for common product behavior.
helpCenter.supportDescription: Where to go when you need more help.
helpCenter.supportNotice: A real support inbox is not connected in this version. For now, keep issue details, screenshots, and reproduction steps with your project notes.

transactions.title: Adding transactions
transactions.description: Record income and expenses with account and category context.
steps: Open Transactions and choose Add transaction.
Select account, type, category, amount, and date.
Review the details before saving.

budgets.title: Budgets
budgets.description: Set monthly limits by category and track spending progress.
steps: Open Budgets and select the month.
Create or edit a category limit.
Review progress on the dashboard budget section.

debts.title: Debts and loans
debts.description: Track money you owe and money others owe you.
steps: Create a debt or loan with the counterparty name.
Add payments when money moves.
Use the dashboard overview to compare owed and lent totals.

savings.title: Saving goals
savings.description: Create targets and record contributions over time.
steps: Create a goal with a target amount and date.
Add contributions as you save.
Check progress and remaining amount.

categories.title: Categories
categories.description: Organize transactions into income and expense groups.
steps: Open Categories to review available groups.
Use clear names and colors for scanning.
Assign categories when adding transactions.

charts.title: Dashboard charts
charts.description: Use time ranges and periods to inspect trends and distributions.
steps: Select a metric card to change the active chart.
Use period controls for daily, weekly, monthly, quarterly, or yearly views.
Use distribution charts for category and account breakdowns.

assistant.title: AI assistant
assistant.description: Use voice or text to draft finance records faster.
steps: Open the assistant from the dashboard floating action.
Describe the transaction, debt, saving goal, or contribution.
Confirm the parsed result before saving.

localOnly.question: Are settings saved to my account?
localOnly.answer: Not yet. This version shows usable frontend controls, but settings persistence is not connected to a backend endpoint.

missingData.question: Why does a chart or budget look empty?
missingData.answer: Most views only show data for the selected month, range, or signed-in user. Check the date filter and account data first.

voiceAssistant.question: Does the AI save records automatically?
voiceAssistant.answer: No. The assistant prepares a draft and asks for confirmation before saving supported records.

notifications.question: Will I receive push or email notifications?
notifications.answer: No. Notification delivery is not implemented in v1; the notification page is a frontend preference surface only.
